steps.title: Use the feasibility clue
steps.content: The critics say limitarianism would require cooperation between governments and that this goal is likely unachievable. The blank must describe an ideal that is too unrealistic to carry out.

steps.title: Select the impractical word
steps.content: Choice A means routine or careless, Choice C means punishing, and Choice D means workable. Those meanings miss the critics' point about feasibility. A word meaning idealistic but impractical matches the claim. The answer is B.
